zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence Cheney於1397年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾芬 迪頓時，他的父親Sir William Cheney27歲，母親Lady Katherine Pabenham25歲。他於1421年12月13日與Elizabeth Cokayne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年12月31日在英國坎布利其爾享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence Cheney was born in 1397, in Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Cheney, was 27 and his mother, Lady Katherine Pabenham, was 25. He married Elizabeth Cokayne on 13 December 1421. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 31 December 1461, in Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence Cheney est né en 1397, à Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Cheney, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Pabenham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cokayne le 13 décembre 1421. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1461, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Er hat am 13. Dezember 1421 Elizabeth Cokayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1461 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Cheney(이)가 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 펜 딧튼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cheney(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Katherine Pabenham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1421년 12월 13일 Elizabeth Cokayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 12월 31일 영국 캄브리지실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence Cheney родился в 1397 г. в местности фен диттон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Cheney было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Pabenham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cokayne 13 декабря 1421 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 31 декабря 1461 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.
